biography: Zoë Winters (born February 20, 1985) is an American actress. She is most known for her recurring role on Succession (2018–2023), for which she won a Screen Actors Guild Award for Outstanding Performance by an Ensemble in a Drama Series. She has also appeared in Flatbush Misdemeanors (2022), Jules (2023) and Materialists (2025). She grew up in Santa Cruz, California and currently resides in New York City.
name: Zoë Winters
